_comment: English TEXT overrides only. localizeContent() deep-merges this over the resolved Thai content (bundled or live KV) for /en/ — so hrefs, dates, colors, phase and section toggles are NOT repeated here and always follow the single source of truth. Arrays merge element-wise: keep the same order/length as site.json and only include the translated fields.

cbt.headline: The Legend Returns
cbt.subhead: The fastest, fiercest, purest MOBA — back for you
cbt.body: Heroes of Newerth the way you remember it. Nothing in the way — fast, brutal, truly hardcore. Sign up for the Closed Beta and be first back on the battlefield of Newerth.

obt.headline: Open Beta Is Live
obt.subhead: Jump into battle today — no waiting
obt.body: The gates of Newerth are wide open. Free to play — bring your friends.

launch.body: Join players across the region in the legendary MOBA, reborn.

serverOath.title: The Thai Server Oath
serverOath.intro: Before MOBA went mainstream, there was a game that was faster, fiercer, and demanded more skill — and this time it returns on a server truly built for Thai players. This is what we promise.

proofs.title: Thai Matchmaking
proofs.body: Queue in Thailand, meet Thai players — not queued locally and thrown onto a foreign server. The region lock is real.

proofs.title: Low Ping, Thai Routing
proofs.body: Servers and network routes hosted in Thailand. Low latency, instant response — fight on even footing in every teamfight.

proofs.title: Stable — No Mid-game Drops
proofs.body: Stability is monitored throughout CBT — the goal: no freezes, no disconnects, no remaking matches because the server died.

war.title: The War Newerth Awaits
war.subtitle: Two powers, one battlefield — pick a side and prove yourself

legion.lore: An alliance of humanity and the Beast Horde, led by King Jeraziah, the chosen of Sol — sworn to protect the World Tree and drive the demons back into the abyss.

hellbourne.lore: Demons and those consumed by darkness, led by Maliken, once king of the Legion — sacrificed at the Sacrificial Shrine to devour all of Newerth.

media.title: Watch the Battlefield
media.subtitle: Cinematics from the world of Newerth — the scenes you've missed

reel.heading: Best Shots from the Battlefield
reel.caption: Peak moments — the speed and brutality of true HoN

scenes.heading: Bastion of the Legion
scenes.caption: Golden light falls on the last bastion before the war begins

scenes.heading: The Hellbourne Assault
scenes.caption: From the abyss, the demons crash through the defenses

scenes.heading: The Great Clash
scenes.caption: Two powers collide in the heart of Newerth

register.title: Join the Closed Beta
register.subtitle: It all starts on Discord — get your CBT key, the latest updates, and meet the community before anyone else
register.note: Closed Beta keys and how to get in will be announced on Discord

roadmap.title: The Road to the Battlefield
roadmap.intro: Three stages before the gates fully open. We're at the first one now.

stages.note: Closed testing — keys via Discord. Every bit of feedback tunes the Thai server.
Open to everyone. Free to play — bring your friends.
Full launch. The battlefield of Newerth, ready for all.

items.a: Yes, completely free. During the Closed Beta, keys are distributed via Discord.

items.q: Is it really a Thai server? Will I match with Thai players?
items.a: Yes. The region lock is real — queue in Thailand and you meet Thai players, not get thrown onto a foreign server.

items.q: I played the old HoN — can I just download and play?
items.a: Absolutely. It's HoN the way you remember it. Download the client and hit the battlefield — your old skills still count.

items.q: How powerful does my PC need to be?
items.a: The requirements are light — it runs on everyday machines. See the minimum and recommended specs on the download page.

items.q: How's the ping? Will I get dropped mid-game?
items.a: Servers and routing are hosted in Thailand for low ping, and we monitor stability throughout CBT. The goal: no drops, no freezes.

items.q: How do I join the CBT?
items.a: Join our Discord, follow the steps to claim a key, and watch for the server-open announcement. Every update is posted there.

patchNotes.title: Updates from the Team
patchNotes.intro: Real progress notes from the dev team — posting begins when the Closed Beta opens.

download.seoTitle: Download HoN X — Heroes of Newerth Thai Server
download.seoDescription: Download the HoN X game client for Windows — minimum specs, install guide, and mirror links. Return to the battlefield of Newerth.
download.title: Download the Game
download.subtitle: Get your machine ready and return to the battlefield of Newerth

client.lockedNote: Pre-load opens 6 hours before the servers go live — get the files ready and hit the battlefield the second the gates open.

items.title: Download the installer
items.body: Grab the installer from the button above, or use a mirror link if the main one is slow.

items.title: Install the game
items.body: Run the installer and follow the steps. Pick a drive with enough free space.

items.title: Log in
items.body: Sign in with your HoN X account — don't have one yet? Register on the member page.

items.title: Enter the battlefield
items.body: The game patches itself to the latest version automatically. See you in Newerth.

member.seoDescription: Your command center — manage your HoN X account, track your Closed Beta status, and claim perks
member.title: Member
member.subtitle: Your command center — manage your account, track your Closed Beta status, and claim perks
member.comingSoonNote: Accounts go live with the Closed Beta — in the meantime, join Discord to grab a CBT key and get news first.

features.title: Warrior Account
features.body: Manage your account details, change your password, and link your contact channels.

features.title: Closed Beta Key
features.body: Check the status of your CBT key and activate it to play.

features.title: Rewards & Perks
features.body: Claim event items and exclusive perks for founding players.

seo.title: HoN X — Heroes of Newerth Returns | Closed Beta
seo.description: Heroes of Newerth X — the fastest, fiercest, purest MOBA is back. Sign up for the Closed Beta today and join the battlefield of Newerth.
seo.ogImageAlt: HoN X — Better than you remember | Heroes of Newerth, true Thai server
